title: Possession without title as including mineral rights
doc_html:
§155.  Possession without title as including mineral rights

A possessor of land as owner without title possesses the mineral rights inherent in perfect ownership of land.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §155, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§155.  Possession without title as including mineral rights
A possessor of land as owner without title possesses the mineral rights inherent in perfect ownership of land.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §155, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
